# SRG Catering

> Bringing the Restaurant to your home — private dining, event catering and afternoon tea boxes across Gloucestershire.

## Who We Are

SRG Catering was founded in 2020 by Steve Raines-Gardiner during the first lockdown. What started as a local delivery service quickly grew into a full-service catering company known for restaurant-quality food delivered directly to your door.

## What We Do

- Private Dining — bespoke menus served at your home or venue
- Afternoon Tea Boxes — hand-crafted and delivered to your door
- Wedding Catering — full wedding breakfast service
- Buffets — abundant, meticulously presented spreads for any event
- Guest Chef Evenings — restaurant experience in your own home
- Gourmet Desserts & Celebration Cakes

## Allergen Awareness

SRG Catering takes all dietary requirements and allergens seriously. All allergen information is clearly communicated and safely managed.

## Areas Served

Gloucestershire and surrounding areas, including Leonard Stanley, Stroud, and nearby towns.

## Contact
